steps.title: Double the wall area
steps.content: The room has wall area $w$. Painting the walls twice means the paint must cover $2w$ square feet.

steps.title: Divide by coverage
steps.content:
Each gallon covers $260$ square feet, so the gallons needed are
$$P=\frac{2w}{260}=\frac{w}{130}$$
The answer is A.
